items.name: Classic White Marble Ganesh
items.description: Traditional seated Ganesh, hand-carved from pure white marble with a polished finish. Our most popular piece for home pooja rooms.

items.name: Jewelled Crown Ganesh
items.description: Ganesh murti adorned with a stone-studded crown and ornaments, gold-leaf detailing on the drape — a statement piece for festivals and gifting.

items.name: Natural Stone Ganesh
items.description: Compact hand-carved Ganesh in natural stone tone, well-suited for study tables, entrances and smaller mandirs.

items.name: Standing Ganesh on Lotus Base
items.description: Standing Ganesh murti carved atop an open lotus base, symbolising purity and prosperity — a striking centrepiece for entrances and reception areas.

items.name: Modak Ganesh, Golden Finish
items.description: Ganesh murti holding a modak, finished with fine gold detailing on the crown and drape — a popular choice for festive gifting.

items.name: Ram Darbar (Ram–Sita–Lakshman)
items.description: Complete Ram Darbar set hand-carved in white marble with painted detailing and gold accents, made to order in your preferred size.

items.name: Sai Baba Murti
items.description: Finely detailed Sai Baba idol with painted robe and lifelike facial carving, built for home mandirs and temple installations.

items.name: Radha Krishna
items.description: Elegant Radha Krishna pair, hand-carved and hand-painted, available in plain marble or fully decorated finish.

items.name: Shiv Parivar
items.description: Shiva family murti — Shiva, Parvati, Ganesh and Kartikeya carved together on a single base, popular for home temples and public shrines.

items.name: Durga Mata Murti
items.description: Hand-carved Durga Mata idol with detailed weaponry and painted finish, made for both daily worship and festival installations.

items.name: Carved Pillar Arch Mandir
items.description: Marble temple unit with hand-carved pillars and an arched crown, designed to fit an alcove or wall-mounted mandir space.

items.name: Jaali Lattice Temple Niche
items.description: Fine lattice (jaali) work framing the deity niche, combining traditional stone-carving technique with a modern home fit.

items.name: Compact Tabletop Mandir
items.description: Smaller free-standing marble mandir for apartments and offices — full carving detail in a space-saving footprint.

items.name: Wall-Mounted Mandir Niche
items.description: Slim, wall-mounted marble niche for homes with limited floor space, carved with a matching arch and shelf for the deity.

items.name: Corner Mandir Unit
items.description: Triangular corner-fit marble mandir designed to make use of unused room corners without compromising on carving detail.

items.name: Temple Installation Projects
items.description: Large-scale murti carving and on-site installation for temples, including custom deity designs and specific stone requirements.

items.name: Corporate & Wedding Bulk Gifting
items.description: Smaller idols and decor pieces produced in bulk for weddings, housewarmings and corporate gifting, with consistent finish across the order.

items.name: Export & Wholesale Orders
items.description: Container-load and wholesale orders for overseas buyers, with export-grade packaging and crating for safe transit.

items.name: Hotel & Resort Decor Pieces
items.description: Fountains, statues and decorative panels carved to match a hotel or resort's design brief, delivered and installed at scale.

items.name: Personalized Engraved Gifting
items.description: Small marble decor pieces with custom engraving — names, dates or messages — for weddings, retirements and corporate milestones.
